summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UGC Machine platform - both backend APIs and frontend UI flows working well

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 when business profile doesn't exist yet
minor_bugs.impact: Business users may see profile not found error initially
minor_bugs.note: This is expected behavior - business profiles are created differently than creator profiles

test_inconsistencies.note: Likely due to session cookies persisting in test session

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero, social proof stats, packs section
Platform stats API (/api/stats/platform) returns correct data structure
Packs API (/api/packs) returns all 3 packs with proper structure
Creators API (/api/creators) with filtering works correctly
User registration flow for both creator and business types
User login flow with proper authentication
Business dashboard stats and data loading
Browse creators page with search functionality
Packs page with quote request modal
Form validation on registration and quote forms
Error handling for invalid login attempts
